title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v BIZABARIMANA
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v BIZABARIMANA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE - RPAA 00069/2025/CA (Umugwaneza, P.J.) 23
Ukuboza 2025]
Amategeko agenga imanza nshinjabyaha – Igihano – Impamvu nyoroshyacyaha – Uwakoze icyaha
gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, igihe hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha,
ntashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifungo ngo kijye munsi y’imyaka cumi itanu (15).
Incamake y’ikibazo: Ubushinjacyaha bwakurikiranye Bizabarimana mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye
rwa Gicumbi, ku cyaha cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi nyuma yuko
afashwe atwaye ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, avuga ko arushyiriye uwitwa
Muhirwa wari urumutumye, akamuhemba, kandi ko amaze umwaka wose akora ako kazi. Urwo
Rukiko rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko ahamwe n’icyaha cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge bihambaye
byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi. Rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu ya
miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw).
Bizabarimana yajuririye urwo rubanza mu Rukiko Rukuru, avuga ko yahanishijwe ibihano birebire
kandi yaburanye yemera icyaha anagisabira imbabazi. Asaba kugabanyirizwa ibihano. Urwo
Rukiko narwo rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe.
Bizabarimana yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire asaba ko yakongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano kuko
Urukiko Rukuru rutabimugabinyirije bihagije bashingiye ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha ze, abisaba
yifashishije umurongo uvuga ko buri mucamanza ku rwego urwo ari rwo rwose, yemerewe
kongera kugabanyiriza uregwa igihano mu bushishozi bwe kijyanye n’uburemere bw’icyaha
n’ingaruka zacyo
Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko impamvu z’ubujurire za Bizabarimana nta shingiro zifite kuko
yagabanyirijwe ibihano bihagije kandi bishingiye ku mategeko bityo ko atakongera
kubigabanyirizwa.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, igihe
hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ntashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifungo ngo kijye
munsi y’imyaka cumi itanu (15).
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Ingingo ya 2, agace ka (a) na (d) y’Itegeko Nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko
Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Ubushinjacyaha vs Ntamakiriro, RPAA 00391/2023/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku
wa 17/04/2025

Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku wa 29/10/2023, Bizabarimana Innocent, yafashwe atwaye ibiyobyabwenge byo mu
bwoko bw’urumogi, avuga ko arushyiriye uwitwa Muhirwa wari urumutumye, akamuhemba,
kandi ko amaze umwaka wose akora ako kazi, aho arukura mu Karere ka Burera akarushyira
uwarumutumye. Ashyikirizwa Ubugenzacyaha.
[2] Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwamureze mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Gicumbi,
icyaha cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, busaba ko cyamuhama,
agahanishwa igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu ya 21.000.000 Frw.
[3] Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Bizabarimana Innocent mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Gicumbi,
icyaha cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, busaba ko cyamuhama,
agahanishwa igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu ya 21.000.000 Frw.
[4] Mu rubanza N° RP 00691/2023/TGI/GIC, rwaciwe ku wa 14/12/2023, Urukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Gicumbi, rwasanze hari ibimenyetso bihamya Bizabarimana Innocent icyaha
cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi bigizwe na:
a) Ukwemera icyaha kwe, agasobanura ko urumogi arukura ku isoko rya Kinyarwanda arujyana i
Byumba, agasobanura ko yari yahawe akazi n’uwitwa Muhirwa wagombaga kumwishyura 2500
Frw iyo arumugezaho;
b) Imvugo z’abatangabuhamya bamushinja gutunda urumogi no gufatanwa udupfunyika 124;
c) Amafoto amugaragaza afite urumogi;
d) Inyandikomvugo y’ifatira igaragaza ko yafatanwe udupfunyika 124 tw’urumogi.
Urukiko rwashingiye kuri ibyo bimenyetso, rwemeza ko Bizabarimana Innocent ahamwe n’icyaha
cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge bihambaye byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi. Rumuhanisha igifungo
cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu ya miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw).
[5] Bizabarimana Innocent yajuririye urwo rubanza mu Rukiko Rukuru, avuga ko
yahanishijwe ibihano birebire kandi yaburanye yemera icyaha anagisabira imbabazi. Asaba
kugabanyirizwa ibihano.
[6] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko nta kosa Urukiko rubanza rwakoze mu guhanisha
Bizabarimana Innocent igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw kuko aricyo gihano
gito giteganywa n’Itegeko bityo ko adakwiye kongera kukigabanyirizwa.
[7] Mu rubanza N° RPA 00027/2024/HC/KIG, rwaciwe ku wa 31/12/2024, Urukiko Rukuru,
nyuma yo gusuzuma impamvu z’ubujurire za Bizabarimana Innocent, rwasanze zidafite ishingiro
kuko ku rwego rwa mbere yagabanyirijwe igihano mu buryo buhagije ahanishwa igifungo gito
giteganwa n’Itegeko kandi ko umucamanza atemerewe gutanga igihano kiri munsi y’igihano gito

giteganyijwe n’Itegeko nk’uko ingingo ya 2 y’Itegeko no 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura
Itegeko no 68/2018, ryo ku wa 30/08/2018, riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange ibiteganya.
Rubishingiraho, rwemeza ko imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe idahindutse mu ngingo zarwo zose,
rutegeka ko Bizabarimana Innocent akomeza guhanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya
5.000.000Frw.
[8] Bizabarimana Innocent yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, urubanza ruhabwa N° RPAA
00069/2025/CA, ruburanishwa mu ruhame ku wa 09/12/2025, Bizabarimana Innocent yunganiwe
na Me Shema Gerald, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na Harindintwari Côme, Umushinjacyaha ku
rwego rw’igihugu.
[9] Mu mwanzuro w’ubujurire, Bizabarimana Innocent na Me Shema Gerald basaba ko
yakongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano kuko Urukiko Rukuru rutabimugabinyirije bihagije bashingiye
ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha ze.
[10] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko impamvu z’ubujurire za Bizabarimana Innocent, nta shingiro
zifite kuko yagabanyirijwe ibihano bihagije kandi bishingiye ku mategeko bityo ko atakongera
kubigabanyirizwa.
[11] Hakurikijwe izo mpaka, muri uru rubanza harasuzumwa ikibazo cyo kumenya niba
Bizabarimana Innocent akwiriye kugabanyirizwa ibihano.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IKIBAZO KIGIZE URUBANZA
Kumenya niba Bizabarimana Innocent akwiriye kugabanyirizwa ibihano
[12] Bizabarimana Innocent n’umwunganira, basaba ko yakongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano
bashingiye ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha ze ndetse no kumurongo watanzwe mu rubanza no RPAA
00060/2021/CA, rwaciwe ku wa 04/04/2022, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Nsabimana Callixte,
aho Urukiko rwasobanuye ko mu manza nshinjabyaha, iyo abaregwa nta kindi banenga urubanza
rujuririrwa uretse kuvuga gusa ko batagabanyirijwe bihagije, buri mucamanza ku rwego urwo ari
rwo rwose, yemerewe kongera kugabanyiriza uregwa igihano mu bushishozi bwe kijyanye
n’uburemere bw’icyaha n’ingaruka zacyo.
[13] Ubushinjacyaha busaba ko Bizabarimana Innocent atakongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano,
busobanura ko yagabanyirijwe ibihano bihagije hashingiwe ku ngingo ya 2 y’Itegeko no 059/2023
ryo ku wa 04/12/2023, rihindura Itegeko no 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018, riteganya ibyaha
n’ibihano muri rusange.
[14] Bukomeza buvuga ko ku bijyanye n’urubanza Bizabarimana Innocent ashingiraho asaba
kongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano, busanga rutashingirwaho kuko umurongo watanzwe n’Urukiko
udakomeza gukurikizwa mu gihe Itegeko wari ushingiyeho ryavuyeho cyangwa ryahindutse,
busaba ko ahubwo hashingirwa ku murongo watanzwe mu rubanza no RPAA 00832/2024/CA,
rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 17/04/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Bamureke Fred,
igika cya 17.

[15] Ubushinjacyaha busobanura kandi ko icyaha gihanishwa igifungo cya burundu,
igabanyagihano kubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha zemejwe n’umucamanza, igihano gishobora
kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi y’igifungo cy’imyaka 151. Busaba Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
kwemeza ko imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe idahindutse.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
Impaka kuri iyi ngingo, zishingiye ku kumenya niba Bizabarimana Innocent akwiriye
kugabanyirizwa igihano kuri uru rwego kubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha n’umurongo watanzwe
mu rubanza yagaragaje, ku buryo yahanishwa igifungo kiri munsi y’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15)
n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw yahanishijwe n’Urukiko Rukuru.
[16] Ku birebana no kugabanya igihano mu gihe hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ingingo ya 2
y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018
riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, iteganya ko: “Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano ku buryo bukurikira: …; (a) igifungo cya burundu
gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, … (d) igihano
cy’ihazabu gishobora kugabanywa kugeza kuri kimwe cya kane cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito
giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.”
[17] Ku kibazo kijyanye no kumenya niba umuntu wahamijwe icyaha cyo gutunda
ibiyobyabwenge ashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano ku buryo kijya munsi y’igifungo cy’imyaka
cumi n’itanu (15) hashingiwe ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha, cyakemuwe mu manza zitandukanye
zaciwe n’uru Rukiko, kuva aho Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko nº
68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange risohokeye, aho Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire rwemeje ko icyo gihano kidashobora kugabanywa kuko aricyo gito giteganywa
n’itegeko kuri icyo cyaha ndetse no ku kindi cyaha cyose gihanishwa igifungo cya burundu. Muri
izo manza harimo n’urubanza Nº RPAA 00391/2023/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa
17/04/2025, Ubushinjacyaha buburana na Ntamakiriro Ezechiel2.
[18] Nk’uko bigaragara mu gika cya 113, Urukiko Rukuru, rwasanze ubusabe bwa
Bizabarimana Innocent bwo kongera kugabanyirizwa igihano yahanishijwe ku rwego rwa mbere
ashingiye ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha ze, nta shingiro bufite kuko ku rwego rwa mbere
yagabanyirijwe igihano kuburyo buhagije, ahanishwa igifungo cyo hasi giteganyijwe n’Itegeko
kandi ko umucamanza atemerewe gutanga igihano kiri munsi y’igihano gito giteganyijwe, nk’uko
ingingo ya 2 y’Itegeko no 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko no 68/2018 ryo ku
wa 30/08/2018, riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, ibiteganya; rugumishaho igifungo
cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15), n’ihazabu ya miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw) Bizabarimana
Innocent yahanishijwe mu rubanza yajuririye.
[19] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, rurasanga, nta kosa Urukiko Rukuru rwakoze mukugumisha
Bizabarimana Innocent ku gifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw yahanishijwe
1 Busaba ko harebwa urubanza no RPAA 00832/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 17/04/2025,
haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Bamureke Fred, igika cya 16.
2 Reba igika cyarwo cya 14.
3 Reba urubanza no RPA 00027/2024/HC/KIG, rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, ku wa 31/12/2024.

n’Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Gicumbi hashingiwe ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha ze, kuko aricyo
gihano gito giteganywa n’Itegeko nk’uko ingingo ya 2 agace ka (a) n’aka (d), y’Itegeko N°
059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 ryagarutsweho mu gika cya 16 cy’uru rubanza, ibiteganya.
[20] Rurasanga kandi, rushingiye kuriyo ngingo ya 2 ivugwa mu gika kibanziriza iki, ndetse no
ku murongo wafashwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rugendeye kuri iyo ngingo nk’uko byasobanuwe
haruguru mu gika cya 17 cy’uru rubanza, igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw,
Bizabarimana Innocent yahanishijwe mu manza zibanza, kidashobora kugibwa munsi, bityo
impamvu ze z’ubujurire kuriyo ngingo zikaba zidafite ishingiro.
[21] Hashingiwe kubimaze kuvugwa byose, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ibyasabwe na
Bizabarimana Innocent n’umwunganizi we, ko yagabanyirizwa igihano yahanishijwe bashingiye
ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha ze ndetse no kumurongo watanzwe mu rubanza no RPAA
00060/2021/CA, rwaciwe ku wa 04/04/2022, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Nsabimana Callixte,
nta shingiro bifite, kuko yahanishijwe igihano gito gishoboka, kitagibwa munsi, hashingiwe ku
ngingo ya 2 n’umurongo byavuzwe mu gika kibanziriza iki.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[22] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Bizabarimana Innocent nta shingiro bufite;
[23] Rwemeje ko urubanza N° RPA 00027/2024/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, ku wa
31/12/2024, rudahindutse mu ngingo zarwo zose, Bizabarimana Innocent, akaba akomeje
guhanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni
eshanu (5.000.000 Frw).
